## Scope

- Owned paths changed:
- Explicitly deferred or out of scope:

## Verification

- [ ] `./script/format.sh --lint`
- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] `./script/build_and_run.sh --verify` when GUI, resources, scenes, packaging, or launch changed
- Additional focused tests, traces, or manual checks:

## Risk review

- [ ] Concurrency/isolation reviewed when applicable
- [ ] Security/privacy reviewed when processes, IPC, files, credentials, Git, SSH, or AI changed
- [ ] Accessibility and keyboard/menu reachability reviewed when UI changed
- [ ] Performance claims include measurements rather than assumptions

## Durable guidance

- ADRs added or updated:
- Engineering references/nuances added or updated:
- Phase-plan status, dependencies, or exit criteria updated:
- If none, why no durable documentation changed:

## Handoff

- Remaining risks or blockers:
- Next integration dependency:
